calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Haig Arsen Harris, Jr., Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, The Bon Vivants Barbary Coast Originals, LLC,
No appearance by defaulted defendant Akvinta USA, Inc.,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed.

Witness: Joshua Harris sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $ 57,795.34
Pre-Judgment Interest: $7,552.97
Attorney's Fees: $5,557.50
Costs: $490.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $71,725.81

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2015 Continued To Dec-09-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
